'''sangosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oersted|oersted]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oersted|oersted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sangosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sængesheth|sængesheth]] || [[word:sængeshej|sængeshej]] || [[word:sængeshesh|sængeshesh]] || [[word:sængeshe|sængeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sangongoshoth|sangongoshoth]] || [[word:sangongoshoj|sangongoshoj]] || [[word:sangongoshosh|sangongoshosh]] || [[word:sangongosho|sangongosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sangoshoth|sangoshoth]] || [[word:sangoshoj|sangoshoj]] || [[word:sangoshosh|sangoshosh]] || [[word:sangosho|sangosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sangofshoth|sangofshoth]] || [[word:sangofshoj|sangofshoj]] || [[word:sangofshosh|sangofshosh]] || [[word:sangofshof|sangofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sangoshotho|sangoshotho]] || [[word:sangoshojo|sangoshojo]] || [[word:sangoshosho|sangoshosho]] || [[word:sangoshoko|sangoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sangoshoth|sangoshoth]] || [[word:sangoshoj|sangoshoj]] || [[word:sangoshosh|sangoshosh]] || [[word:sangosho|sangosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sangoshothol|sangoshothol]] || [[word:sangoshojol|sangoshojol]] || [[word:sangoshoshol|sangoshoshol]] || [[word:sangoshokol|sangoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sangoshothotho|sangoshothotho]] || [[word:sangoshojojo|sangoshojojo]] || [[word:sangoshoshosho|sangoshoshosho]] || [[word:sangoshoko|sangoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sangoshothon|sangoshothon]] || [[word:sangoshojon|sangoshojon]] || [[word:sangoshoshon|sangoshoshon]] || [[word:sangoshokon|sangoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sangoshothoro|sangoshothoro]] || [[word:sangoshojoro|sangoshojoro]] || [[word:sangoshoshoro|sangoshoshoro]] || [[word:sangoshokoro|sangoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
